flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Southeast Community College Area rose 35% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.7k → $3.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Southeast Community College Area rose 33% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.2k → $4.3k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Southeast Community College Area fell 16% between 2006 and 2009 (32.1% → 27.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 9 pp at Southeast Community College Area vs the 2003–2007 baseline (26.5% vs 35.2%).
